Title: Participant Information and Consent Form — Document Header
Description: Header identification block — Study, Country, Site, Protocol, Sponsor, ICD version.

Title: Consent Form — Version and Amendment Tracking
Description: Version tracking table for the ICF document — includes amendment dates and version numbers.

Title: Visit Schedule — Screening and Baseline
Description: Visit schedule for the screening and baseline periods of the BNT162b2 clinical trial.

Title: Visit Schedule — Vaccination Doses and Follow-up
Description: Visit schedule for dose 1, dose 2, and follow-up visits.

Title: Schedule of Activities (SOA) — Primary
Description: Primary schedule of study activities, procedures, and assessments by visit.

Title: Schedule of Activities (SOA) — Continued
Description: Continuation of the schedule of activities covering post-delivery follow-up.

Title: Participant Rights and Risk-Benefit Summary
Description: Summary of participant rights, risks, and potential benefits of study participation.

Title: Emergency and Study Contact Information
Description: Study investigator, site coordinator, and emergency telephone contact details.

Title: COVID-19 Infection Risk Summary
Description: Summary of COVID-19 infection risks for relevant population groups.

Title: Vaccine Side Effects and Frequency Table
Description: Frequency and severity of solicited and unsolicited adverse events post-vaccination.

Title: Participant Consent Signature Block
Description: Participant signature block for informed consent — includes name, date, signature fields.

Title: Witness and Investigator Signature Block
Description: Witness and investigator signature block confirming completion of the consent process.
